fields.salesDebitNoteNumberingDisabled: Do not use separate numbering for Debit Notes

tooltips.supplierBillPostingDate:
If enabled, the Posting Date can be specified for Bills and Bill Credits.

If disabled, the Posting Date will always match the document date.
tooltips.paymentEntryPostingDate:
If enabled, the Posting Date can be specified for Payments.

If disabled, the Posting Date will always match the Date Paid.
tooltips.salesDraftNumbering:
If enabled, documents will receive their final number only upon issuance.

If not enabled, pre-issued and issued documents will use the same numbering sequence, which results in gaps in the numbering of issued documents.

Concerns Invoices, Credit Notes, Payments, Write-Offs, Bills, and Bill Credits.
tooltips.salesTaxCodesEnabled:
If enabled, only pre-defined tax codes can be selected for line items. Enabling is highly recommended.

If disabled, an arbitrary tax rate value can be specified for line items. Makes it impossible to use tax and ledger reports. Not recommended to disable.
tooltips.salesInvoiceListPrice:
If enabled, list prices can be specified in Invoices.

If not enabled, list prices can only be set in Quotes and Sales Orders.
tooltips.salesForbidOrderUnlock: Once a document is locked, it can be unlocked only by an administrator.
tooltips.salesIssuanceLocking:
Once issued, documents cannot be unissued and certain fields become locked.

Concerns Invoices, Credit Notes, Payments, Write-Offs, Bills, and Bill Credits.
